title: Herbal Tinctures for Throat Pain: 9 Natural Solutions
description: Althaea officinalis tincture is a herbal remedy that can help soothe throat pain. It is made from the root of the marshmallow plant, which has been used for centuries to calm irritated tissues. When you swallow the tincture, the active ingredients are absorbed into your body and reach your throat. They work by reducing inflammation and swelling, making it easier to swallow and talk. The tincture also has a soothing effect on the mucous membranes in your throat, helping to calm coughs a...
